front: What are the tradeoffs between Pub/Sub Lite and standard Pub/Sub?
back: Standard Pub/Sub is fully managed, globally replicated, and auto-scales with no capacity planning; you pay per message volume. Pub/Sub Lite is a lower-cost alternative that requires you to provision capacity (throughput and storage) in advance and is zone-redundant only (not global). Lite is up to 80% cheaper for predictable, high-volume workloads. Gotcha: Lite has stricter ordering guarantees per partition but lacks some standard features like schema enforcement and dead letter topics.
